title: Glossy Vibrant Bouquet, Flower Box/Vase - Transportation Display, Presentation Boxes (1, Rose Gold)
features: White Cardboard inners, ensuring there is no 'ugly brown' basic cardboard to show
Glossy finish for a top quality look
These are great for flower / sweet presentation gifts
Ideal for weddings, parties, anniversary ideas etc
Height of each box when fully assembled - 24.5cm, with a base of 18cm x 18cm
These will arrive Flat-Packed and are very easy to assemble
Range of colours & pack sizes available, please select from the available options
description: Product Description Cute, Colourful Bouquet Boxes These cute bouquet boxes are the perfect addition to any bouquet / gift! LARRYROO Glossy Bouquet, Flower Box / Vase - Transportation Display Boxes Welcome to our range of Glossy Bouquet Boxes Available in a range of colours & pack sizes - Choose from the available options These would be the perfect addition to any bouquet / present to show that you love them! White Cardboard inners which ensures there is no basic cardboard on show The boxes have a glossy finish for a top quality look. Delivered Flat packed for convenient storage & very easy to assemble The height of each box when assembled - 24.5cm, with a base of 18cm x 18cm. Available in 20 Vibrant Colours - Simply select from the options Black Burgundy Dark Green Fuchsia Gold Ivory Kraft Brown Please note the kraft brown boxes do not have the glossy finish. Light Blue Lilac Lime Green Orange Pink Purple Red Rose Gold Royal Blue Silver Teal White Yellow
